---
title: "Evolución temporal"
subtitle: "Histórico operativo del visor fuego"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)

read_history <- function() {
  candidates <- c(
    "data/processed/dashboard_history.csv",
    "assets/history/dashboard_history.csv"
  )
  for (path in candidates) {
    if (file.exists(path) && file.info(path)$size > 0) {
      x <- tryCatch(readr::read_csv(path, show_col_types = FALSE), error = function(e) tibble::tibble())
      if (nrow(x) > 0) {
        attr(x, "source_path") <- path
        return(x)
      }
    }
  }
  x <- tibble::tibble()
  attr(x, "source_path") <- NA_character_
  x
}

safe_num <- function(x) suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))

hist <- read_history()
hist_source <- attr(hist, "source_path")

if (nrow(hist) > 0) {
  hist <- hist |>
    mutate(
      snapshot_date = as.Date(snapshot_date),
      n_firms = safe_num(n_firms),
      n_firms_6h = safe_num(n_firms_6h),
      n_firms_24h = safe_num(n_firms_24h),
      frp_total_mw = safe_num(frp_total_mw),
      n_alertas = safe_num(n_alertas),
      n_alertas_altas = safe_num(n_alertas_altas),
      n_alertas_medias = safe_num(n_alertas_medias),
      max_alert_score = safe_num(max_alert_score)
    ) |>
    arrange(snapshot_date)

  latest <- hist |> slice_tail(n = 1)
  previous <- if (nrow(hist) >= 2) hist |> slice(nrow(hist) - 1) else tibble::tibble()

  delta_value <- function(col) {
    if (nrow(previous) == 0) return(NA_real_)
    safe_num(latest[[col]])[1] - safe_num(previous[[col]])[1]
  }

  fmt_delta <- function(x) {
    if (is.na(x)) return("—")
    if (x > 0) paste0("+", x) else as.character(x)
  }
}
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Cómo se genera este histórico

Cada ejecución de `scripts/99_run_all.R` añade una fotografía operativa del visor a:

```text
assets/history/dashboard_history.csv
```

Por defecto se conserva la última ejecución de cada día (`HISTORY_MODE=daily_latest`) y se retienen 90 días (`HISTORY_KEEP_DAYS=90`).

```{r}
if (nrow(hist) > 0) {
  cat("Registros históricos:", nrow(hist), "· Fuente:", hist_source)
} else {
  cat("No hay histórico todavía. Ejecuta `Rscript scripts/09_update_dashboard_history.R` después del pipeline.")
}
```
:::

```{r summary-cards, results='asis'}
if (nrow(hist) > 0) {
  htmltools::tags$div(
    class = "summary-grid",
    htmltools::tags$div(class = "summary-card", htmltools::tags$span("Última fecha"), htmltools::tags$strong(as.character(latest$snapshot_date))),
    htmltools::tags$div(class = "summary-card", htmltools::tags$span("Focos FIRMS"), htmltools::tags$strong(latest$n_firms), htmltools::tags$small(paste("Δ", fmt_delta(delta_value("n_firms"))))),
    htmltools::tags$div(class = "summary-card", htmltools::tags$span("Focos ≤24 h"), htmltools::tags$strong(latest$n_firms_24h), htmltools::tags$small(paste("Δ", fmt_delta(delta_value("n_firms_24h"))))),
    htmltools::tags$div(class = "summary-card", htmltools::tags$span("FRP total"), htmltools::tags$strong(paste0(latest$frp_total_mw, " MW")), htmltools::tags$small(paste("Δ", fmt_delta(round(delta_value("frp_total_mw"), 1))))),
    htmltools::tags$div(class = "summary-card", htmltools::tags$span("Alertas"), htmltools::tags$strong(latest$n_alertas), htmltools::tags$small(paste("Δ", fmt_delta(delta_value("n_alertas"))))),
    htmltools::tags$div(class = "summary-card", htmltools::tags$span("Alertas altas"), htmltools::tags$strong(latest$n_alertas_altas), htmltools::tags$small(paste("Δ", fmt_delta(delta_value("n_alertas_altas"))))),
    htmltools::tags$div(class = "summary-card", htmltools::tags$span("Top provincia"), htmltools::tags$strong(ifelse(is.na(latest$top_provincia), "—", latest$top_provincia))),
    htmltools::tags$div(class = "summary-card", htmltools::tags$span("Top CCAA"), htmltools::tags$strong(ifelse(is.na(latest$top_ccaa), "—", latest$top_ccaa)))
  )
}
```

## Evolución de focos FIRMS

```{r chart-firms}
if (nrow(hist) > 0) {
  ggplot(hist, aes(x = snapshot_date, y = n_firms)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_point() +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Focos", title = "Detecciones FIRMS totales por ejecución diaria") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
} else {
  cat("Sin datos para graficar.")
}
```

## Focos recientes

```{r chart-recent}
if (nrow(hist) > 0) {
  recent <- hist |>
    select(snapshot_date, `≤6 h` = n_firms_6h, `≤24 h` = n_firms_24h) |>
    tidyr::pivot_longer(-snapshot_date, names_to = "ventana", values_to = "focos")

  ggplot(recent, aes(x = snapshot_date, y = focos, linetype = ventana)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_point() +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Focos", linetype = "Ventana", title = "Detecciones recientes") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
} else {
  cat("Sin datos para graficar.")
}
```

## Evolución de FRP

```{r chart-frp}
if (nrow(hist) > 0) {
  ggplot(hist, aes(x = snapshot_date, y = frp_total_mw)) +
    geom_col() +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "MW", title = "FRP total diario de las detecciones FIRMS") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
} else {
  cat("Sin datos para graficar.")
}
```

## Alertas operativas

```{r chart-alerts}
if (nrow(hist) > 0) {
  alert_series <- hist |>
    select(snapshot_date, Total = n_alertas, Altas = n_alertas_altas, Medias = n_alertas_medias) |>
    tidyr::pivot_longer(-snapshot_date, names_to = "tipo", values_to = "alertas")

  ggplot(alert_series, aes(x = snapshot_date, y = alertas, linetype = tipo)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_point() +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Alertas", linetype = "Tipo", title = "Evolución de alertas FIRMS") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
} else {
  cat("Sin datos para graficar.")
}
```

## Últimos registros

```{r table-history}
if (nrow(hist) > 0) {
  hist |>
    arrange(desc(snapshot_date)) |>
    select(
      Fecha = snapshot_date,
      `FIRMS` = n_firms,
      `≤6 h` = n_firms_6h,
      `≤24 h` = n_firms_24h,
      `FRP MW` = frp_total_mw,
      Alertas = n_alertas,
      Altas = n_alertas_altas,
      `Top provincia` = top_provincia,
      `Top CCAA` = top_ccaa
    ) |>
    head(30) |>
    knitr::kable()
}
```
